home.title: Acme — Production-ready Astro and Cloudflare starter
home.description: Launch a fast multilingual website with typed i18n, content collections, GSAP reveals, Cloudflare images, and consent-aware analytics.

about.title: About Acme — Why this production-ready starter exists
about.description: Learn the principles behind Acme and how its practical Astro, Cloudflare, accessibility, content, and localization patterns fit together.

blog.title: Acme Blog — Astro, Cloudflare, and web platform guides
blog.description: Read practical guides about Astro, Cloudflare, performance, accessibility, localization, content collections, and modern web development.

contact.title: Contact Acme — Start building your next Astro project
contact.description: Contact the Acme team to discuss the starter, share feedback, or ask how its Astro and Cloudflare patterns fit your next production website.

legalPrivacy.title: Privacy Policy — How Acme protects visitor information
legalPrivacy.description: Learn what visitor information Acme collects, why it is processed, how long it is retained, and which privacy choices are available to you.

legalTerms.title: Terms of Use — Rules for using the Acme starter website
legalTerms.description: Review the conditions that govern access to the Acme website, its example content, external services, and the production-ready starter.

legalCookies.title: Cookie Policy — Consent and analytics practices at Acme
legalCookies.description: Understand how Acme uses essential cookies, optional analytics, consent preferences, and related browser storage across this starter website.
